title: Electric Bug Zapper Mosquito Killer USB Rechargeable 360° UV Mosquito Killer Lamp, Portable Insect Fly Trap with Night Light, Electric Fly Killer for Indoor Outdoor, Home, Garden, Camping, Travel
bullet_points: Electric Mosquito Killer - Powerful & Efficient: The rechargeable mosquito killer lamp contains 18W high-intensity ultraviolet light, which can effectively attract mosquitoes and other harmful flying insects by releasing a wavelength of 365nm and 360 °, and then immediately kill them with a 2000V high dome. Electric bug zapper can effectively cover an area of more than 90 square meters

Rechargeable Electric Fly Killer - Portable And USb Charging: The electric mosquito killer lamp small in size, which is convenient to carry when going out. Electric fly zapper with a portable handle that can be rotated 90 degrees, you can hang it on a rope or branch. Rechargeable mosquito killer with an insulated electric shock grid, 5V safety voltage design, the mosquito killer is also equipped with a built-in 4000mAh high-capacity rechargeable battery

Electric Bug Zapper Protect You From Biting By Mosquitoes: The electric mosquito killer contains a bug-killing bulb that emits bright ultraviolet rays and a high-power grid installed in a cage to prevent accidental contact and effectively protect children and pets from electric shock. Electric fly zapper using an ultra-quiet working design, the sound does not exceed 20 dB, will not disturb you or your baby's rest and sleep, suitable for night use

High Quality Electric Mosquito Killer: The body of the electric mosquito killer is made of high-temperature ABS material, which has good durability. USB rechargeable fly killer uses LED light source to generate a 365nm lightwave wavelength that mosquitoes love most. It induces mosquitoes to get close to the light source and die by electric shock. Camping mosquito repellent is non-toxic, smokeless, tasteless, and non-radiation

Wide Application of Rechargeable Bug Zapper: Electric mosquito killer if widely used in homes, kitchens, living room, toilet, deck, pool area, garage, hotel, restaurant, porch, backyard, patio, lawn, garden, etc. Our camping mosquito repellent/rechargeable fly killer is very effective against mosquitoes, flies, moths and other flying insects
